Class ObjectSummarizer

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.internal.ObjectSummarizer
public class ObjectSummarizer extends Object
Utility class designed to generate concise, human-readable summaries and truncations of complex Java objects, collections, maps, and strings.
Author:
anahata

  • Constructor Summary

    Description

    Formats a value for display in a summary.

    Formats a value for display in a summary with fine-grained control over map summarization.

    Checks if an object is null, a blank string, or an empty collection/map.

  • Constructor Details

    • ObjectSummarizer

      public ObjectSummarizer()

  • Method Details

    • isNullOrEmpty

      public static boolean isNullOrEmpty(Object value)
      Checks if an object is null, a blank string, or an empty collection/map.
      Parameters:
      value - The object to check.
      Returns:
      true if the object is considered null or empty.

    • formatValue

      public static String formatValue(Object value, int maxLength)
      Formats a value for display in a summary. It intelligently handles collections, maps, and long strings.
      Parameters:
      value - The object to format.
      maxLength - The maximum length for the formatted string or individual lines.
      Returns:
      A formatted, summarized, and truncated string.

    • formatValue

      public static String formatValue(Object value, int maxLength, boolean summarizeMapValues)
      Formats a value for display in a summary with fine-grained control over map summarization.
      Parameters:
      value - The object to format.
      maxLength - The maximum length for the formatted string or individual lines.
      summarizeMapValues - If true, map values are recursively summarized; otherwise, a simple entry count is shown.
      Returns:
      A formatted, summarized, and truncated string.

    • formatMap

      private static String formatMap(Map<?,?> map, int maxLength)
      Formats and recursively summarizes the entries of a Map.
      Parameters:
      map - The map to format.
      maxLength - The maximum allowed length of the resulting string.
      Returns:
      A serialized and summarized representation of the map.

    • truncateLine

      private static String truncateLine(String line, int maxLineLength)
      Truncates an individual string line to prevent it from exceeding a maximum length threshold.
      Parameters:
      line - The line of text to truncate.
      maxLineLength - The maximum allowed length for the line.
      Returns:
      The truncated line, or the original line if it fits within the limit.
